action.reasoning: Observation: Exploration script partially ran - I can see obs keys/shapes but it crashed on a zero-size array. Key agent_0 sensors: goal_to_agent_gps_compass (2,), humanoid_detector (1,), other_agent_gps (2,), head_rgb (256,256,3), head_depth (256,256,1). Analysis: Need to fix the zero-size array issue and see metrics. Then build a heuristic controller since literature shows heuristic expert outperforms RL. Decision: Fix exploration script, then immediately build a heuristic-based predict.py that uses gps_compass to navigate toward human and maintain 1-2m distance.
